name: Beer Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg and flour together in a bowl.
2. Gradually add beer to the mixture, stirring continuously until it reaches the desired consistency.
3. Add seltzer water as needed to thin out the batter further.
4. Adjust seasoning with salt to taste.
5. Use this batter for onion rings or fried chicken. Thicker batters will result in heavier coatings; adjust according to preference.
Makes 1 Cup
